// Gemcrafter: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order. Toggles and lists through ExcludeTransferSpellNameContains.
// Enabled: Master switch for Gemcrafter patches and behavior.
// EnableImmersiveUseHooks: Immersive item-on-item UX (tool→gem, powder→equipment) via generic use handler. If patching fails, Gemcrafter falls back to /gemcrush and /gemapply.
// EnableLootgenGemMagic: Lootgen gem behavior: roll spells onto qualifying gems.
// MinSpellsOnLootgenGem: Minimum spells on a lootgen-tinkering gem (first version often matches Max).
// MaxSpellsOnLootgenGem: Maximum spells on a lootgen-tinkering gem.
// GemWcidAllowlist: If non-empty, only these WCIDs count as lootgen tinkering gems. Empty = heuristic (ItemType.Gem + not already magical).
// IncludeCantrips: Include cantrip-tier spells when building the spell pool.
// IncludePortalRecallSummonOnGems: Allow portal/recall/summon-class spells in the gem pool; transfer can still exclude them separately.
// IncludeSpellNameContains: If non-empty, only spells whose names contain one of these substrings are candidates (pool filter).
// ExcludeSpellNameContains: Spell names containing any of these substrings are excluded from the pool (unless overridden by include rules).
// CrusherToolWcid: Mortar & Pestle (or crush tool) WCID for immersive crush flow; 0 until configured for your shard.
// InfusedPowderWcids: Base-game powder WCIDs to treat as infused powder for apply flows.
// TransferMaxSpellsPerApply: Max spells moved from gem to equipment per apply.
// ExcludeTransferSpellNameContains: Spells whose names match these substrings are not transferred to equipment by default.
